title: heatExchanger operation
description: Two-stream heat exchanger solved by the effectiveness-NTU method (the rating problem).  Hardware-only: the heat-transfer area, the overall coefficient U, and an optional flow arrangement.  The outlet temperatures, the duty Q and the LMTD are RESULTS.  For 'I need T_hot_out = X' wrap the unit in a DesignSpec outerDict that manipulates $area (or $U) with a target on this unit's T_hot_out KPI.  This is the TWO-stream unit; the single-stream `heater` (furnished duty Q) is separate.

area.title: Heat-transfer area (hardware)
area.description: The exchanger surface.  Larger area -> more NTU -> the outlet temperatures approach the thermodynamic limit.

U.title: Overall heat-transfer coefficient (hardware)
U.description: Overall U for the surface (film + wall + fouling lumped).  NTU = U*area / C_min.
